---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, gssoc
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `python smartphone_ranker.py`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened (include error message/traceback if any).

## Environment
- OS: (e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (e.g. 3.10)
- Package versions: (paste output of `pip list`)

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste the terminal output.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
